_meta.purpose: Reusable registry of EXTERNAL public data sources for the five LOVS data leverages, and where each one plugs into the existing system. Outbreak-agnostic: future snapshots reuse the provider list and the lever -> system mapping; only data/external_sources/<outbreak>.observed.json changes per outbreak.
_meta.licensing: CC-BY-4.0 covers this schema and the Arcede annotations. Each external provider's data is under its own license; see per-lever provider notes and confirm terms before redistribution.
_meta.staging_note: This is a STAGING and PROVENANCE layer. It does not modify any released or pinned snapshot. The released live-bdbv-2026-output.json and data/calibration-ledger.json are immutable and pre-committed; new sources are incorporated only at a future scored refresh, never retroactively.

access_legend.public_download: Available now from an open, citable source.
access_legend.public_qualitative: Public, but only as narrative or a figure, not machine-numeric.
access_legend.partner_only: Not published at the needed granularity; must come from MoH / INRB / WHO line lists.

levers.wishlist: A {health-zone-id: confirmed_count} mapping for affected districts. The largest single discrimination lever the method is missing.

public_providers.name: WHO Disease Outbreak News / AFRO External Situation Report
public_providers.gives: aggregate counts, zone names, health-areas-affected per zone

levers.best_public_proxy: Health areas affected per zone (Rwampara 6, Mongbwalu 3 per WHO DON 602); first 8 confirmed all attributed to Rwampara HZ (13 INRB samples, 8 positive).
levers.status_2026_05: GAP. No source publishes a numeric per-zone confirmed table; a partner line list is required.

levers.wishlist: A partial onset-date histogram for one health zone (two columns: anonymous row id, onset date). Narrows the latent-active-chains interval.

public_providers.name: WHO AFRO Situation Report (figure)
public_providers.gives: aggregate epidemic curve as an image, not numeric

levers.status_2026_05: PARTIAL. Index onset and demographics are public; a per-zone numeric onset histogram is partner-only.

levers.wishlist: For zones the snapshot missed, a GPS centroid plus a one-sentence rationale.

model_target.consumed_by: brief geographic map and corridor geography (coordinates are NOT used in the risk math, only the map)

public_providers.name: RGC.cd DRC health-zone shapefile (zone_sante190613)
public_providers.gives: 519 DRC health-zone polygons + DHIS2 codes; polygon centroid method
public_providers.note: SHA-256 e0b672d7ad6f387c26d13ad357185d1152139b91fb7ba70235def55888db9702; method already used for Rwampara

public_providers.name: HDX COD-AB / Uganda OCHA admin boundaries
public_providers.gives: admin-2 boundaries; district-HQ town coordinates for Uganda

levers.status_2026_05: MOSTLY DONE. Mahagi, Arua, Goma, Beni and the Uganda targets already carry validated centroids in zones.json. Outstanding: Nebbi (UGA). See observed.json.

levers.wishlist: Admin-2 call-detail-record summaries or surveyed transport flows. The documented next lever for corridor-spread discrimination.

model_target.field: road_connectivity_index (existing) + proposed movement_share dimension; or run_local corridor_edge_weights

public_providers.name: IOM DTM Ituri Province Mobility Tracking
public_providers.gives: admin-2 displacement/movement intensity by territory of origin (surveyed, not CDR)

public_providers.name: OSBP / TradeMark Africa border-crossing documentation
public_providers.gives: cross-border throughput intensity for named crossings (e.g., Mahagi/Goli)

public_providers.name: Call-detail-record (CDR) mobility matrices
public_providers.note: Not public for this geography; partner_only. IOM DTM is the practical equivalent.

levers.status_2026_05: READY. New lever, staged in observed.json with a transparent edge-weight recipe.

levers.wishlist: Observed sample-to-PCR-result delays, in days. Directly updates the reporting-completeness prior.

model_target.field: publication_latency_50 / reporting_completeness_50 (snapshot output) and the underlying nowcast prior

public_providers.name: WHO DON 602
public_providers.gives: assay-mismatch detail (Bunia GeneXpert Zaire-only -> negatives -> INRB Kinshasa PCR); Uganda sample-to-result ~4 days

levers.status_2026_05: READY (qualitative + two datapoints). Per-sample numeric turnaround distribution is partner-only. See observed.json.
